headline: Is VICI Properties (VICI) a Cheap REIT to Look at
summary: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) is one of the 10 cheap REITs with huge upside. On March 12, Mizuho downgraded VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) to a Neutral rating. The firm estimated a target price of $30 for the stock, citing potential tenant credit concerns. These are tied to reports that Tilman Fertitta is exploring an acquisition […]
